name: Quarterly Revenue IR Narrative
description: Turn a quarterly revenue file into an investor-relations-ready narrative — segment breakdown, driver explanations, guidance reconciliation, and anticipated analyst questions — written for scrutiny, not promotion.
author: accilium

variables.name: REVENUE_DATA
variables.description: Quarterly revenue figures, by segment/region if available, vs. prior period and guidance.
variables.example: Total revenue EUR 128m (prior Q EUR 119m, guidance EUR 125-130m); Segment A EUR 80m (+6%); Segment B EUR 48m (+11%)...

variables.name: BUSINESS_CONTEXT
variables.description: Known drivers behind the numbers — new contracts, FX effects, one-offs, macro events.
variables.example: Segment B growth driven by a new EUR 6m annual contract signed in April; FX tailwind of ~1.5% from USD exposure

example_input: REVENUE_DATA: total EUR 128m vs guidance EUR 125-130m; PERIOD: Q2 2026; BUSINESS_CONTEXT: new contract signed in April
